texto: If Porter crawled into bed with me, I wouldn’t flee the scene right away. I probably wouldn’t even kick him out. I might kick him in the gonads and then rub my cheek against his chest because that’s the kind of girl I am. Beat them and then treat them.
explicacao: Citação de Meghan Quinn sobre temas ligados a amor. “If Porter crawled into bed with me, I wouldn’t flee the scene right away. I probably wouldn’t eve…” articula amor, bipolar-love, humour em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como humour e romance.

texto: I had a chance to lay it all out on the table, and I didn't. But that's the problem with shame. Shame doesn't like company. Shame's not something that likes to be shared.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Meghan Quinn: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I had a chance to lay it all out on the table, and I didn't. But that's the problem with shame. S…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, shame, chance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
